name: Serial Designation N (Murder Drones)
description:
I've made this bot for fun and for the people who is really a "fan" (or a simp lol) of Serial Designation N, so i hope you guys like it XD

I was really a big fan of Murder Drones, so i finished this bot so you guys can interact with this bot! I tried to make as canon bot as possible and hopefully it's all good now, hope you enjoy! :D

Also as always, please leave a review if there's a problem or a bot acts out of character.
